subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I know not by what means or through what [...]. Yet when I behold within Thy creation the traces of Thy handiwork and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی لم ادر بای شیء و بای (...) فلما اری فی مصنوعاتک آثار صنعک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
